text: 65yo male, severe chest pain radiating to the left arm. Elevated troponin levels. History of hypertension.
30yo female, sudden onset of temporal headache, visual field loss. No prior medical history.
12yo male, fever, sore throat, swollen lymph nodes. Strep test positive.
55yo male, severe chest pain, elevated troponin, no fever. Smoker, family history of coronary artery disease.
